name: @research-engineering/agentic-proofkit
description: Reusable proof profile, report, graph, and witness-planning primitives.

scripts.check: npm run npm:version && npm run source-hygiene && npm run text-policy && npm run go:check && npm run package:artifact && npm run self:receipt && npm run self:coverage && npm run release:closeout
scripts.go:check: npm run go:fmt && npm run go:test && npm run go:vet && npm run go:staticcheck && npm run go:actionlint && npm run go:vulncheck
scripts.npm:version: node -e "const {execFileSync}=require('node:child_process'); const expected=require('./package.json').packageManager.split('@').at(-1); const actual=execFileSync('npm',['--version'],{encoding:'utf8'}).trim(); if(actual!==expected){throw new Error('expected npm '+expected+', got '+actual)}"
scripts.package:artifact: npm run build && go run ./internal/tools/packagepack && go run ./internal/tools/packageverify && npm run python:package && npm run python:verify && npm run release:manifest
scripts.platform:smoke: go run ./internal/tools/packagebuild current && ./dist/agentic-proofkit --help >/dev/null && go run ./internal/tools/pythonpackage build-current && go run ./internal/tools/pythonpackage verify-current
